must_detect.matched_text:
Aurum Harbour Holdings Limited (HKEX: AHHL, Stock Code: 0X77) — Non‑binding Term Sheet for Proposed Acquisition of Pearl Logistic Systems (HK) Limited (Project “Pearl Tram”).
Parties: Buyer — Aurum Harbour Holdings Limited (Hong Kong); Seller — Vantage Mandarin Fund SPC – Segregated Portfolio C (Cayman), contact: Ms. Ophelia Tsoi, ophelia.tsoi@vantage‑mandarin.fund.
Consideration: HK$1,280,000,000 payable 70% cash and 30% by issuance of new AHHL shares at HK$3.60 per share (subject to H K E X Listing Rules and any mandate limit).
Valuation: Based on FY2024 audited EBITDA of HK$320m; enterprise value set at 4.0x EV/EBITDA; no earn‑out.
Conditions precedent: (i) Shareholders’ approval as a Very Substantial Acquisition under Chapter 14; (ii) confirmation that the SFC Takeovers Code is not triggered; (iii) no legal prohibition; (iv) execution of definitive documents.
Inside information handling: The terms herein are not generally known and are issuer‑relative material; disclosure to be made “as soon as reasonably practicable” under P a r t X I V A of the SFO via HKEX e‑Submission after signing or upon market leak; trading halt to be requested if required.
Selective disclosure: No dissemination to analysts or particular investors except via approved wall‑crossing; insider lists and clean team protocols to be maintained; no one‑to‑one briefings on non‑public terms.
Closed periods: Directors and relevant employees must not deal during blackout windows (Model Code Appendix 10) and any issuer‑imposed closed period prior to results; pre‑clearance and dealing notifications to continue.
Public reference: See the profit alert published on 8 Mar 2025 on HKEXnews (https://fake.hkexnews.hk/listedco/0000/2025/03/08/profit‑alert_AHHL.pdf), which is already public and unrelated to this proposed acquisition.
Background note: Pearl Logistic Systems’ Q3 2024 customer win was disclosed in a 29 Sep 2024 press release; those operational updates were broad and may now be stale and non‑indicative of current pipeline.
No MAC: Completion is not conditional on the absence of a material adverse change in the Target; standard warranties (title, capacity, solvency) and limited indemnities only.
Timeline: Target signing late June 2025; long‑stop 30 Sep 2025; announcement and circular to be issued within Listing Rules timetable, with dispatch extension application if necessary.
Confidentiality and channels: Subject to NDA; documents to be shared only via secure data room; email contact: dealdesk@aurum‑harbour.hk; o r al updates via encrypted line only.
Issuer‑relative materiality trigger: If pricing or consideration mix changes by >5% of AHHL’s market cap, an immediate inside information announcement will be made even before definitive signing.
